message:
feat(fp-frame): add Series.duplicated_keep with DuplicateKeep parameter

Series.duplicated_keep(keep): mark duplicate values with control over
which occurrence to keep (First/Last/None), matching DataFrame's
existing duplicated API. Existing duplicated() now delegates to
duplicated_keep(First).

3 new tests, 841 total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
